name: unreal-engine-mcp-codex
description: Safe Codex workflows for Epic's official Unreal Engine 5.8 MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Operate UE 5.8 safely through Epic's MCP
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Unreal Engine 5.8's official ModelContextProtocol server, use live-editor MCP operations safely, and run unattended build, automation, validation, and cook workflows without opening editor windows.
defaultPrompt: Use Unreal MCP to inspect this project safely.
Check Unreal MCP setup for this project.
